_comment: OpenRouter model registry for SaguaroBench. Tag is the short name used
in CLI args + result filenames. `slug` is the OpenRouter routing slug.
provider routing — matches the WanderBench config used to score the
same six models on that benchmark, so apples-to-apples comparisons are
Verify slug names against https://openrouter.ai/models before running.
Pricing changes; cost-caps in run.py are a backstop, not a budget.

gemini35_flash.notes: Vision-native. Cheapest of the six on per-token basis.

qwen37_plus.notes: Vision-capable. No quantization pin — let OpenRouter pick best provider.

qwen35_397b.notes: MoE 397B-A17B. Pinned fp8 to match WanderBench run config.

gemma4_26b.notes: Gemma 4 26B-A4B. VERIFY exact OpenRouter slug — Gemma family naming changes between releases.
